hooks.command: $i = [Console]::In.ReadToEnd() | ConvertFrom-Json; $cmd = $i.tool_input.command; if ($cmd -match '\bmain\b|\bmaster\b') { Write-Output '{"continue": false, "stopReason": "[HOOK] Pushing to main/master requires explicit user confirmation."}' } else { exit 0 }

$i = [Console]::In.ReadToEnd() | ConvertFrom-Json; $cmd = $i.tool_input.command; if ($cmd -match 'appsettings|\.env|secrets|credentials|password|token') { Write-Output '{"continue": false, "stopReason": "[HOOK] Blocked: staging a secrets-adjacent file requires explicit user approval."}' } else { exit 0 }
hooks.statusMessage: Checking for secrets in staged files...

hooks.command: $i = [Console]::In.ReadToEnd() | ConvertFrom-Json; $cmd = $i.tool_input.command; if ($cmd -match 'reset\s+--hard|clean\s+-f|checkout\s+--') { Write-Output '{"continue": false, "stopReason": "[HOOK] Destructive git operation requires explicit user confirmation."}' } else { exit 0 }
